import math
import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torchvision.models as models

class PositionalEncoding(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, d_model, max_len=5000):
        super().__init__()
        pe = torch.zeros(max_len, d_model)
        position = torch.arange(0, max_len, dtype=torch.float).unsqueeze(1)
        div_term = torch.exp(torch.arange(0, d_model, 2).float() * (-math.log(10000.0) / d_model))
        pe[:, 0::2] = torch.sin(position * div_term)
        pe[:, 1::2] = torch.cos(position * div_term)
        self.register_buffer('pe', pe.unsqueeze(0))

    def forward(self, x):
        return x + self.pe[:, :x.size(1), :]

class ImageEncoder(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, d_model=512):
        super().__init__()
        densenet = models.densenet121(weights='IMAGENET1K_V1')
        self.features = densenet.features
        self.bn = nn.BatchNorm2d(1024)
        self.proj = nn.Conv2d(1024, d_model, kernel_size=1)
        self.norm = nn.LayerNorm(d_model)
        self.pe = PositionalEncoding(d_model, max_len=5000)

    def forward(self, x):
        if x.size(1) == 1:
            x = x.repeat(1, 3, 1, 1)
        x = self.features(x)
        x = self.bn(x)
        x = self.proj(x)
        b, c, h, w = x.shape
        x = x.flatten(2).permute(0, 2, 1)
        x = self.norm(x)
        x = self.pe(x)
        return x

class Decoder(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, vocab_size, d_model=512, nhead=8, num_layers=6, dim_feedforward=2048, dropout=0.1, max_len=512):
        super().__init__()
        self.embedding = nn.Embedding(vocab_size, d_model)
        self.pos_encoder = PositionalEncoding(d_model, max_len)
        self.dropout = nn.Dropout(dropout)
        layer = nn.TransformerDecoderLayer(d_model=d_model, nhead=nhead, dim_feedforward=dim_feedforward,
                                           dropout=dropout, batch_first=True)
        self.transformer = nn.TransformerDecoder(layer, num_layers=num_layers, norm=nn.LayerNorm(d_model))
        self.fc = nn.Linear(d_model, vocab_size)
        self.d_model = d_model
        self.scale = math.sqrt(d_model)

    def forward(self, tgt, memory, tgt_mask=None, tgt_key_padding_mask=None, memory_key_padding_mask=None):
        tgt_emb = self.embedding(tgt) * self.scale
        tgt_emb = self.dropout(self.pos_encoder(tgt_emb))
        out = self.transformer(tgt_emb, memory, tgt_mask=tgt_mask,
                               tgt_key_padding_mask=tgt_key_padding_mask,
                               memory_key_padding_mask=memory_key_padding_mask)
        return self.fc(out)

class HMERModel(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, vocab_size, d_model=512, nhead=8, num_layers=6, dropout=0.1, max_len=512):
        super().__init__()
        self.encoder = ImageEncoder(d_model)
        self.decoder = Decoder(vocab_size, d_model, nhead, num_layers, dropout=dropout, max_len=max_len)
        self.max_len = max_len

    def forward(self, images, tgt_input, tgt_mask=None, tgt_key_padding_mask=None, memory_key_padding_mask=None):
        memory = self.encoder(images)
        return self.decoder(tgt_input, memory, tgt_mask=tgt_mask,
                            tgt_key_padding_mask=tgt_key_padding_mask,
                            memory_key_padding_mask=memory_key_padding_mask)

    @staticmethod
    def generate_square_subsequent_mask(sz, device):
        mask = torch.triu(torch.ones(sz, sz, device=device), diagonal=1)
        mask = mask.masked_fill(mask == 1, float('-inf'))
        return mask

    @torch.no_grad()
    def predict(self, images, sos_id, eos_id):
        self.eval()
        b = images.size(0)
        device = images.device
        memory = self.encoder(images)
        tgt = torch.full((b, 1), sos_id, dtype=torch.long, device=device)
        for _ in range(self.max_len - 1):
            mask = HMERModel.generate_square_subsequent_mask(tgt.size(1), device)
            out = self.decoder(tgt, memory, tgt_mask=mask)
            nxt = out[:, -1:].argmax(dim=-1)
            tgt = torch.cat([tgt, nxt], dim=1)
            if (nxt == eos_id).all():
                break
        return tgt

    @torch.no_grad()
    def beam_search(self, images, sos_id, eos_id, beam_width=5, max_len=256):
        self.eval()
        B = images.size(0)
        device = images.device
        memory = self.encoder(images)
        memory = memory.repeat_interleave(beam_width, dim=0)

        sequences = torch.full((B * beam_width, 1), sos_id, dtype=torch.long, device=device)
        scores = torch.zeros(B, beam_width, device=device)
        scores[:, 1:] = -1e9
        finished = torch.zeros(B, beam_width, dtype=torch.bool, device=device)

        for step in range(max_len - 1):
            tgt_len = sequences.size(1)
            mask = HMERModel.generate_square_subsequent_mask(tgt_len, device)
            out = self.decoder(sequences, memory, tgt_mask=mask)
            log_probs = torch.log_softmax(out[:, -1, :], dim=-1)
            log_probs = log_probs.view(B, beam_width, -1)

            if finished.any():
                log_probs = log_probs.masked_fill(finished.unsqueeze(-1), float('-inf'))
                log_probs[:, :, eos_id] = torch.where(
                    finished, torch.zeros_like(log_probs[:, :, eos_id]), log_probs[:, :, eos_id]
                )

            log_probs[:, :, sos_id] = float('-inf')

            next_scores = scores.unsqueeze(-1) + log_probs
            next_scores_flat = next_scores.view(B, -1)
            topk_scores, topk_indices = torch.topk(next_scores_flat, beam_width, dim=-1)

            beam_indices = topk_indices // log_probs.size(-1)
            token_indices = topk_indices % log_probs.size(-1)

            sequences = sequences.view(B, beam_width, -1)
            sequences = torch.gather(sequences, 1, beam_indices.unsqueeze(-1).expand(-1, -1, sequences.size(-1)))
            sequences = sequences.view(B * beam_width, -1)
            next_tokens = token_indices.view(B * beam_width, 1)
            sequences = torch.cat([sequences, next_tokens], dim=1)

            scores = topk_scores
            finished = torch.gather(finished, 1, beam_indices)
            finished = finished | (token_indices == eos_id)

            if finished.all():
                break

        sequences = sequences.view(B, beam_width, -1)
        return sequences[:, 0, :]
